description: Run shell commands on a remote host via SSH as a Dagster asset.

asset_name.label: Asset Name
asset_name.description: Dagster asset key for this component.

host_env_var.label: Host Env Var
host_env_var.description: Name of the environment variable containing the hostname or IP address of the remote host.

username_env_var.label: Username Env Var
username_env_var.description: Name of the environment variable containing the SSH username.

port.label: Port
port.description: SSH port on the remote host.

commands.label: Commands
commands.description: Ordered list of shell commands to execute on the remote host.

fail_on_non_zero.label: Fail On Non Zero
fail_on_non_zero.description: Raise an exception when any command exits with a non-zero status code.

owners.label: Owners
owners.description: Asset owners — team names (team:analytics) or email addresses.

asset_tags.label: Asset Tags
asset_tags.description: Key-value tags applied to the asset in the Dagster catalog, e.g. {"domain": "finance"}.

kinds.label: Kinds
kinds.description: Asset kinds shown in the Dagster catalog (e.g. snowflake, python). Auto-inferred from component name if empty.

freshness_max_lag_minutes.label: Freshness Max Lag (minutes)
freshness_max_lag_minutes.description: Maximum acceptable lag in minutes before this asset is considered stale.

freshness_cron.label: Freshness Cron Schedule
freshness_cron.description: Cron schedule for the freshness policy, e.g. '0 9 * * 1-5' (weekdays 9am).

description.label: Description
description.description: Human-readable description surfaced in the Dagster UI.

deps.label: Deps
deps.description: Upstream asset keys this asset depends on.
